topics.title: Howard TV and Henry Hill Footage
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming launch of Howard TV, a planned film festival for fan-submitted content, and shares footage of an intoxicated Henry Hill.

topics.title: Steve Martin and Celebrity Media Scandals
topics.summary: The studio discusses a polite interaction with Steve Martin regarding a comedy sketch, the growth of satellite radio listenership, and the fallout from a public figure's fraudulent memoir.

topics.title: Homocop Re-recording and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features a re-recorded skit titled "Homocop" and discusses the controversial public persona of actor Steven Baldwin.

topics.title: Oprah and the Fraudulent Book
topics.summary: The studio discusses a book author who fabricated details about undergoing medical procedures without anesthesia, leading to a public confrontation with Oprah Winfrey.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey Controversy and Roast Preparations
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the discrepancies in an author's memoir featured on Oprah's program, followed by segments on professional sprint car racing and a debate over personal identity.

topics.title: The Roast of Ralph Serrell
topics.summary: The studio hosts a roast of Ralph Serrell, featuring insults regarding his appearance and career while the production team manages technical audio issues.

topics.title: The Ralph Rose Comedy Roast
topics.summary: The studio hosts a comedy roast featuring various comedians and guests who perform insults and jokes directed at Ralph, while the show also includes musical interludes and segments involving Howard Stern.

topics.title: Comedy Roast Segment
topics.summary: The studio hosts a roast where comedians and callers trade insults and jokes directed at various individuals, including Ralph and Reverend Bob Lee.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Sketch Comedy
topics.summary: The studio features a roast of a regular and various comedic segments including a scripted skit about a robot cop.

topics.title: Rolling Stone and Middle East Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses the lack of freedom on terrestrial radio, the complexities of the Israeli-Palestinian conflict, and perceived hypocrisy regarding Rolling Stone's editorial choices and advertising.

topics.title: Coal Mine Safety vs. Radio Censorship
topics.summary: The studio debates the absurdity of equating coal mine safety issues with concerns over radio obscenity and the host's compensation.

topics.title: Guest Appearance Logistics and News Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses the frequency of guest appearances for a recurring segment, evaluates the influence of Oprah Winfrey, and reviews upcoming news stories including a roast, a death threat investigation, and an upcoming guest appearance by Danny Bonaducci.

topics.title: Production Logistics and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming segments regarding comedy roast performances, internal production coordination for guest coverage, and various news reports involving criminal convictions.

topics.title: Current Events and Upcoming Show Guests
topics.summary: The studio covers various news stories including legal cases involving child endangerment, a fatal crossbow incident, and the national obesity crisis, while also discussing upcoming guests like P. Diddy and plans for a roast of Danny Bonaducci.
